title: HARVEST HUSKIES AFTER-SCHOOL PROGRAM - 211info
text: NEW HARVEST CHURCH HARVEST HUSKIES AFTER-SCHOOL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a faith-based after-school program that includes mentoring, homework assistance, and enrichment activities. Space is limited. 4290 Portland Road NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Students who are enrolled at Hallman Elementary School Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 2pm-4:30pm Email (503) 763-6911 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 763-6911 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Marion County Services: Mentoring Programs * Youth Issues Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - COMMUNITY OUTREACH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
